name: Bank One Corporation
description: Bank One Corporation was a major American financial services holding company headquartered in Chicago, Illinois. At its peak, it was the sixth-largest bank in the United States, offering a wide range of banking, investment, and credit card services. The company traded on the New York Stock Exchange under the ticker symbol ONE until it was acquired by JPMorgan Chase & Co. in a merger completed on July 1, 2004. Following the acquisition, Bank One's operations were integrated into the JPMorgan Chase brand, significantly expanding the latter's retail banking presence across the United States.
